name: trae-skills-bundle
description: The most comprehensive MCP Skills collection. 16 production-grade tools for AI-assisted development including Git, Terminal, Code Review, Testing, Debugging, and more.
longDescription:
# Trae Skills Bundle

## The World's Largest MCP Skills Collection

16 production-grade Model Context Protocol servers designed for AI IDEs:

### 🚀 Core Skills (Auto-Start)
- **Git** - Complete version control toolkit
- **Terminal** - Secure shell execution environment
- **Code Review** - AI-powered code analysis
- **Coding Workflow** - Standardized development process

### 🧪 Development Tools
- **Test Generator** - Automatic test creation
- **Documentation** - JSDoc & README generation
- **Code Search** - Advanced semantic search
- **Code Generator** - Intelligent scaffolding
- **Dependency Analyzer** - NPM audit & version management

### 🛠️ Language Specific
- **React Toolkit** - Hooks, components, best practices
- **TypeScript Master** - Type safety & optimization

### 🔐 DevOps & Security
- **Docker Toolkit** - Container generation
- **Security Auditor** - Vulnerability scanning
- **Performance Optimizer** - Bundle size & speed

### 🔄 Workflows
- **Debugging Workflow** - Systematic troubleshooting
- **Refactoring Workflow** - Safe code transformation

---

## Compatibility

✅ **Trae IDE** - Native support
✅ **Claude Desktop** - Zero configuration
✅ **Cursor IDE** - Auto-detected
✅ **Windsurf** - Full MCP support
✅ **Ollama** - Local model support
